statusLine.command: jq -r '(.model.display_name // "Claude") as $m | (.workspace.current_dir | sub("^/Users/[^/]+"; "~")) as $d | (.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0) as $t | (.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0) as $ot | (.context_window.used_percentage // 0) as $p | (.effort.level // "") as $el | (.cost.total_duration_ms // 0) as $ms | (($t / 1000 | round) | tostring) as $tk | (($ot / 1000 | round) | tostring) as $otk | ($ms / 1000 | floor) as $tot_sec | ($tot_sec / 3600 | floor) as $hr | (($tot_sec % 3600) / 60 | floor) as $min | ($tot_sec % 60) as $sec | (if $hr > 0 then ($hr|tostring) + "h " else "" end + if $min > 0 or $hr > 0 then ($min|tostring) + "m " else "" end + ($sec|tostring) + "s") as $time_str | "\u001b[36m" + $m + "\u001b[0m | \u001b[33m" + $tk + "k " + $otk + "k (" + ($p|tostring) + "%)\u001b[0m" + (if $el != "" and $el != "null" then " | \u001b[35m" + $el + "\u001b[0m" else "" end) + " | \u001b[90m" + $d + "\u001b[0m | \u001b[90m" + $time_str + "\u001b[0m"'
